scripts.test:e2e: npm run sync:contracts && node scripts/run-playwright.mjs e2e/platform.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:phase8-6-1: npm run sync:contracts && node scripts/run-playwright.mjs e2e/phase8-6-1.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:visual: npm run sync:contracts && node scripts/run-playwright.mjs e2e/visual-authenticity.spec.ts
scripts.test:a11y: npm run sync:contracts && node scripts/run-playwright.mjs e2e/visual-authenticity.spec.ts --grep Accessibility
scripts.test:all: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run test:sanctuaire && npm run test:gigalodon && npm run test:reliability && npm run build && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:e2e:phase8-6-1 && npm run test:e2e:visual
